text: The migration to Kubernetes was scheduled for Q3, but the security audit delayed it until next quarter.

text: After the patch release, the service latency dropped by 15 percent.
note: Temporal cue indicating latency change occurred after patch release.

text: The feature toggle was turned off to prevent a race condition during concurrent deployments.

text: Because the upstream service returned 503 errors, we implemented a circuit breaker.

text: The deployment pipeline was updated to include a static analysis step before testing.
note: No CTLG cue; statement describes an update without causal/temporal marker.

text: We rolled back the database schema change after the production outage was confirmed.
note: Temporal cue indicating rollback occurred after outage confirmation.

text: The migration script was rewritten because the original version failed to handle null timestamps.
note: Explicit causal cue linking failure to script rewrite.

text: The feature was released to a subset of users to validate performance under real load.
note: No CTLG cue; purpose clause does not trigger causal/temporal tag.

text: Because the test suite passed, the release candidate was promoted to staging.
note: Explicit causal cue linking test success to promotion.

text: The rollout was halted when the load balancer started returning 429 errors.
note: No CTLG cue; conditional clause does not contain explicit causal/temporal tag.

text: We scheduled a maintenance window for the API upgrade because the new version requires schema locks.

text: The deployment was delayed until the security team approved the new container image.
note: No CTLG cue; temporal marker 'until' does not trigger a temporal tag without explicit anchor.

text: Because the API response time exceeded 200ms, we introduced caching for read‑heavy endpoints.
note: Explicit causal cue linking high response time to caching introduction.

text: The feature flag was toggled on after the performance benchmark met the SLA.
note: Temporal cue indicating toggle occurred after benchmark success.

text: We rolled back the cache invalidation policy because cache hits dropped below 70 percent.
note: Explicit causal cue linking low cache hits to policy rollback.

text: The migration to the new logging framework was completed before the end of the fiscal quarter.
note: Temporal cue indicating completion occurred before quarter end.

text: Because the dependency graph changed, the build order was reordered to avoid circular references.
note: Explicit causal cue linking graph change to build order reordering.

text: The feature was disabled in production because a race condition was observed in staging.
note: Explicit causal cue linking observed race condition to feature disable.

text: We postponed the release candidate until the security audit report was finalized.
note: No CTLG cue; 'until' clause lacks explicit temporal anchor tag.

text: The API versioning scheme was updated to semantic versioning after the team adopted the new release policy.
note: Temporal cue indicating update occurred after policy adoption.

text: Because the test environment lacked realistic data, the integration tests were skipped.
note: Explicit causal cue linking environment limitation to test skip.

text: The deployment was aborted when the health check failed for the primary replica.
note: No CTLG cue; conditional clause does not contain explicit causal/temporal tag.

text: We scheduled a post‑deployment verification step after the rollout to monitor error rates.
note: Temporal cue indicating step scheduled after rollout.

text: The feature toggle was turned off because the downstream service was undergoing maintenance.
note: Explicit causal cue linking service maintenance to toggle deactivation.

text: During the 2023-07-22 outage, the monitoring-agent failed to emit metrics, which delayed the incident response.
